title: Part Feeding Wizard Vision Find Part Sequence
description:
Part Feeding Wizard Vision Find Part Sequence

Vision Find Part Sequence

This screen is used to configure vision settings.

Item	Description

Part Vision Sequence	Required setting: This field is mandatory.

Select the name of the vision sequence
		 used to detect parts.

Only sequence with robot calibrations
		 can be selected.

Vision Object for front of part	Required setting: This field is mandatory.

Select the name of the vision object used
		 to detect parts for picking up.  Only objects that return
		 RobotXYU results are displayed.

Vision Object for back of part	This field is mandatory when flip is
		 required (refer to General).

Select the name of the vision object used
		 to detect parts that cannot be picked up because they are facing
		 down  Only objects that return RobotXYU results are displayed.
